commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes nullable and literal-union runtime tool schemas for provider/Codex exposure, preserves raw null clear-sentinel validation, isolates cron schema instances, and refreshes affected prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +100, Tests +130. Total +230 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns raw projected schemas and coerces union branches before accepting an already-valid null branch, while the PR adds tests for raw null validation and projected provider-safe cron schemas.
commands.review_followup: - The maintainer-labelled core agents/provider schema PR has no ClawSweeper repair target; the remaining action is maintainer merge-scope review.

target.title: fix(agents): project nullable tool schemas for providers
target.body:
## Summary

- Project nullable and literal-union tool schemas into the OpenAPI-friendly provider schema shape used for runtime tools.
- Preserve runtime validation semantics for explicit `null` clear sentinels before provider projection.
- Make cron clear-sentinel fields real TypeBox unions, then project them to provider-compatible plain `string` / `array` / `object` schema shapes for model-facing output.
- Keep cron tool schema instances isolated so provider projection/normalization cannot mutate the raw schema used by validation or later tool instances.
- Refresh the prompt snapshots affected by the projected schema output after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed 2 shards / 101 tests under Node 24.15.0
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed 3 shards / 115 tests under Node 24.15.0
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check` passed, `Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.discord-group.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.heartbeat-turn.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/codex-dynamic-tools.telegram-direct.json test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/discord-group-codex-message-tool.md test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/telegram-direct-codex-message-tool.md test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path/telegram-heartbeat-codex-tool.md` passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts` passed
- `git diff --check` passed
- final diff private reported-name scrub passed
- Earlier AWS Crabbox changed gate before the latest rebase: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_cbb1c631efeb`, run `run_4415ced3845b`, command `pnpm check:changed`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, exit 0.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: strict provider adapters should not receive `anyOf`/`oneOf`/`const`/null-type composition from runtime tool schemas when a provider-safe projection is available; runtime validation should still preserve explicit `null` clear sentinels; provider projection must not poison shared cron schema objects.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree rebased onto current `origin/main`, final head `c54a143c214`; earlier AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate on the provider-projection slice.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: rebased onto current `origin/main`; fixed the raw cron schema to use real nullable TypeBox unions; regenerated prompt snapshots; reran focused cron/provider projection tests, prompt snapshot check, formatter, lint, diff check, and private-name scrub.

Evidence after fix: focused cron proof passed 2 shards with 101 tests; focused provider proof passed 3 shards with 115 tests; prompt snapshots are current; local lint/format checks passed; earlier remote `pnpm check:changed` completed successfully in run `run_4415ced3845b`.

Observed result after fix: raw cron tool validation accepts `agentId`, `sessionKey`, and `payload.toolsAllow` as `null` clear sentinels, while projected cron schemas expose provider-compatible plain `string`/`array`/`object` shapes and each cron tool instance receives independent nested schema objects.

What was not tested: live Telegram or full assistant-turn E2E; this PR is limited to runtime schema projection, argument validation, cron schema-instance isolation, and prompt snapshot contracts.

## Current CI note

The failed rollup on `15c66cfee5d4068b010c111114ea13f4386b4f38` exposed two branch-owned issues: cron raw validation still saw a provider-shaped schema, and prompt snapshots drifted after `origin/main` moved. The branch is now rebased onto current `origin/main` and pushed at `c54a143c214`.
target.author: vincentkoc
